steps.title: Identify the substitution needed
steps.content: We need to find $f(2)$ using the definition $f(x) = x^3 + 9$. To evaluate the function at $x = 2$, we substitute \$2$ in place of $x$.

steps.title: Substitute and evaluate
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 2$ into $f(x) = x^3 + 9$:

$$f(2) = (2)^3 + 9$$

Calculate the power: $2^3 = 8$

$$f(2) = 8 + 9 = 17$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
